description_long: This is a large, rectangular desk with a dark wood-grain tabletop and a sturdy, modern base. The tabletop appears to be made of a single, solid piece of wood or wood veneer, featuring a rich, natural texture. The base consists of two wide, black metal legs arranged in an X-shape, connected by a horizontal support bar for added stability. The overall design is minimalist and industrial, with clean lines and a robust structure suitable for heavy use. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or other attachments, emphasizing its function as a spacious work surface. The desk's proportions suggest it is intended for group work or meetings, making it ideal for collaborative environments.
description: A large, rectangular desk with a dark wood-grain top and black X-shaped metal legs, featuring a minimalist and industrial design.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the short end, highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the X-shaped metal base.
description_view_1: The desk is viewed from the long side, showing the full expanse of the tabletop and both X-shaped legs connected by a horizontal bar.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end-on perspective emphasizes the depth of the tabletop and the geometric base.
description_view_3: A side view like view 1, displaying the length of the desk and the structural support beneath.
attribute_orientation: The long side with the unobstructed tabletop and visible support bar is intended to face the user, with the X-shaped legs at each end providing stability.
